//: Optional tuning config for the autonomous SOLVER worker (worker/solver.mjs). Copy this to worker/solver.config.json (gitignored) only if you want to override a default — the solver runs fine without it. convexUrl may be left empty — the solver falls back to VITE_CONVEX_URL in ../.env.local. Env: REVIEWLOOP_CONVEX_URL, CLAUDE_BIN.
//checkouts: The repo→checkout registry does NOT live here. It lives in Convex (`solverCheckouts`, keyed by this machine's hostname) and is edited from the console's Solver checkouts rail panel. The row is only the pointer — you still prepare the clone on this machine. Use DEDICATED solver-owned clones, not your personal ones: the reviewloop-feature worktree symlinks node_modules back to the parent, so a solve doing `npm install` would mutate your deps, and stale worktrees would litter a repo you use. One-time setup per repo: `gh repo clone <slug> <path> && cd <path> && npm install && cp <your-clone>/.env.local .env.local`, then register <path> in the console. A ready-for-agent issue on a repo with no registered checkout is claimed and FAILED with a clear reason (never silently stalled).
